import { Navbar } from "@/components/Navbar"; import { Footer } from "@/components/Footer"; import { MessageSquare, PhoneCall, Info, FileText, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react"; import Link from 'next/link'; import Image from 'next/image'; export default function CustomerSupportPage() { return (
{/* Top Banner with Breadcrumbs */}

Customer support

Home → Customer Support
{/* Main Content Container */}
{/* 4-Column Action Cards */}
{/* Chat */} {/* Call Us */} {/* FAQs */} {/* Write Us */}
{/* FAQ Section */}

Frequently Asked Questions:

{/* FAQ 1 */}
Are there any flight ticket promotions going on?
{/* FAQ 2 */}
How do i change my tickets?
{/* FAQ 3 */}
How can i cancel my flight ticket?
{/* FAQ 4 */}
Have a different question? Chat with us now.
{/* Dark Airplane Banner Section */}

Journeys Simple, Safe, And Affordable

Enjoy Zero
Convenience Fee {/* Tapered Swoosh Underline */}

{/* Optional slide indicators directly on the background */}
); }

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

"use client"; import { Navbar } from "@/components/Navbar"; import { Footer } from "@/components/Footer"; import { Plane, Trash2, Clock, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import Image from "next/image"; const BookingCard = ({ bookingNo, date, from, fromCode, to, toCode, terminal, flight, price, passengers }: any) => (
{/* Card Header */}
Booking No. {bookingNo}
Booking Date: {date}
{/* Card Body */}
{/* Route Info */}

{from}, {fromCode}

Terminal {terminal}

{fromCode === "DEL" ? "23:00" : "10:00"}
{/* Plane Path Line */}
AI

{flight}

4 hr

{to}, {toCode}

Terminal {terminal}

{toCode === "DEL" ? "23:00" : "03:00"}
{/* Payment & Passengers */}
Payment: $ {price}

Passengers: {passengers.length < 10 ? `0${passengers.length}` : passengers.length}

{passengers.map((p: any, i: number) => (
{p.name} {p.age}yr
))}
); export default function MyBooking() { const bookings = [ { no: "3124123522421", date: "October 12, 2025", from: "New Delhi", fromCode: "DEL", to: "Bangkok", toCode: "BKK", terminal: "3", flight: "Air India (AI 121)", price: "2,063.00", passengers: [{ name: "Harshit chirgania", age: 23 }, { name: "Vaibhav Arora", age: 43 }] }, { no: "3124123522421", date: "October 12, 2025", from: "New Delhi", fromCode: "DEL", to: "Bombay", toCode: "BOM", terminal: "3", flight: "Air India (AI 121)", price: "2,063.00", passengers: [{ name: "Harshit chirgania", age: 23 }, { name: "Vaibhav Arora", age: 43 }] } ]; return (
{/* Header Banner */}

My booking

Home → My Booking
Showing {bookings.length < 10 ? `0${bookings.length}` : bookings.length}
Sort by Recommended
{bookings.map((b, i) => ( ))}
{/* Dark Airplane Banner Section */}

Journeys Simple, Safe, And Affordable

Enjoy Zero
Convenience Fee {/* Tapered Swoosh Underline */}

{/* Optional slide indicators directly on the background */}
); }
